mapper.select: SELECT m.memberId, mi.nameH, mi.nameK, mi.phone, mi.email, mi.addNumber, mi.adds, mi.infoAdd FROM member m JOIN memberInfo mi ON m.memberNo = mi.memberNo WHERE m.memberNo = #{memberNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE memberinfo SET phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, addNumber = #{addNumber}, adds = #{adds}, infoAdd = #{infoAdd} WHERE memberNo = #{memberNo}
UPDATE memberinfo SET phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, addNumber = #{addNumber}, adds = #{adds}, infoAdd = #{infoAdd} WHERE memberNo = #{memberNo}
mapper.select: SELECT r.stars, l.loanNo, l.loanDate, l.returnDate, b.bookTitle, b.bookImg, b.writer, b.bookNumber FROM loan l JOIN book b ON b.bookNumber = l.bookNumber LEFT JOIN review r ON r.loanNo = l.loanNo WHERE l.memberNo = #{memberNo} AND l.loanDate BETWEEN #{firstDay} AND #{secondDay} AND b.bookTitle LIKE CONCAT('%', #{titlesearch}, '%');
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review ( memberNo, bookNumber, review, stars, loanNo ) VALUES ( #{memberNo}, #{bookNumber}, #{review}, #{stars}, #{loanNo} )
